title: Times Higher Education: Share Agent ‘Bad Actor’ Data With Universities, Home Office Told | Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy LLP

New UK student sponsor guidance could reshape how universities manage recruitment agents. In Times Higher Education , Senior Immigration Manager Jonathan Hill said the Home Office appears to be using data analysis to assess agent trust, while noting the changes may increase compliance demands and leave universities seeking greater clarity on how this data will be shared.
Read more here (this article may require a subscription to access it).
